ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Advanced From Jan-13-14 To Nov-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Lydia Chavez-Espinosa.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to fees being based upon the gross value of the rental receipts. The Court granted extraordinary fees for the Attorney, denied extraordinary fees for the Administrator and granted the request to reduce distribution to Rosa and Maria (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Continued To Dec-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses On Admin. Reasonably Related To The Real Property Located At 2001 Geneva Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94134 And For Order Establishing Order Of Priority Of Payments From Escrow
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Advanced From Oct-02-12 To Sep-17-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Amount Of Expenses On Admin. Reasonably Related To The Real Property Located At 2001 Geneva Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94134 And For Order Establishing Order Of Priority Of Payments From Escrow
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for Lydia Chavez-Espinosa. Elizabeth Scott appeared by telephone for Bank of America (Creditor).

Ms. Scott stated that they have no objection. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Amount of Expenses of Administration Reasonably Related to the Real Property (subject to receipt and review of a corrected order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
